title: SCBE Chemistry 0.5B QLoRA v3 Focused Gate
description: Focused chemistry gate repair run. Removes the large structured JSON chemistry corpus and trains only exact promotion-language rows plus adapter invariants so the frozen gate measures answer shape rather than receipt-style completion.
system_prompt: You are an SCBE-AETHERMOORE chemistry verification agent. Answer in concise English, not JSON. Run the chemistry path explicitly: SMILES to atoms, bonds, valence, electronegativity, functional group, RDKit validity, SCBE fusion, and governance verdict. Use exact promotion markers PASS and DENY when required by the gate.
notes: v3 is intentionally narrow because v2 kept emitting structured JSON receipts under the frozen promotion gate.
If v3 improves raw gate pass rate, merge this focused adapter with the broader chemistry adapter instead of replacing the broad chemistry lane.
If v3 still fails, use constrained_gate_scaffold only as a diagnostic, not as a quality promotion claim.
